You need to verify your identity before registering as a business.
Please complete the verification process first.

pending.title: Application Under Review
pending.message: Your business registration has been submitted and is currently being reviewed by our team. This usually takes 1-2 business days. We'll notify you once your application is approved.

landing.title: Business Account
landing.description: Transform your passion into profit. Start selling products on our Shop marketplace or offer booking services through our Book platform. Reach thousands of active users and grow your business with our all-in-one platform.
landing.readyDescription: Join our platform and start growing your business today.

registered.title: Your Business is Registered!
registered.subtitle: Manage your products and orders
registered.description: Access your full vendor dashboard to add products, manage orders, and grow your business.

sellProducts.title: Sell Products
sellProducts.description: List unlimited products on our Shop marketplace with integrated payment processing

orderManagement.title: Order Management
orderManagement.description: Track all orders and bookings in one centralized dashboard

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.description: Get paid fast with our integrated payment system and automated payouts

intro.title: Upgrade to Business
intro.description: Start selling products on our Shop marketplace or offer booking services through our Book platform. Reach thousands of active users!

features.management: Manage orders & bookings in one place

step3.title: Review & Submit
step3.termsText1: By registering as a business on our platform, you agree to comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding the sale of products and/or provision of services.
step3.termsText2: You confirm that all information provided is accurate and truthful, and you agree to update this information promptly if it changes.
step3.termsText3: Platform fees: 5% commission on all sales. Payment processing fees may apply.
step3.termsText4: Violation of our terms may result in suspension or termination of your business account without prior notice.
step3.agreeText: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy. I confirm that all information provided is accurate and I have the authority to register this business.
step3.readyText: Your application will be reviewed within 24-48 hours. You'll receive an email notification once approved.

validation.edgeSpaces: Password cannot start or end with spaces
